name: multica-codex-sync
description: Continuously sync a Codex Desktop task with a Multica issue.

interface.shortDescription: Sync Codex conversations with Multica issues.
interface.longDescription: Bind a Codex Desktop task to a Multica issue, then continuously sync new visible messages and token usage. Tracker state stays in private plugin data.
defaultPrompt: Show me how to connect this task to a Multica issue.
Check whether Multica Codex Sync is ready.
Safely clean up Multica Codex Sync before uninstalling.
